site.name: Reuben Analytics Studio
site.description: Turning raw data into strategic decisions. Data analysis consulting for ambitious businesses.

portfolio.title: Executive Sales Dashboard for Fintech Client
portfolio.description: Replaced fragmented spreadsheets with a single Tableau dashboard giving the leadership team real-time visibility into revenue, pipeline, and regional performance.
portfolio.outcome: Adopted as the primary reporting tool for weekly exec meetings; cut manual report prep by 15+ hours/month.

portfolio.title: Customer Churn Model for SaaS Company
portfolio.description: Built a propensity-to-churn model using Python and Scikit-learn, with clear feature importance and a scoring pipeline the team could run monthly.
portfolio.outcome: Client reported 23% reduction in churn in the first full quarter after rollout; model now drives retention outreach.

portfolio.title: KPI Framework and Reporting Suite for Retail Group
portfolio.description: Defined a group-wide KPI dictionary, designed a reporting cadence (daily ops, weekly trading, monthly exec), and delivered Power BI reports aligned to it.
portfolio.outcome: Unified metrics across 3 brands; leadership now uses one source of truth for performance reviews.

services.title: Business Intelligence & Dashboards
services.description: Custom interactive dashboards that surface the KPIs that matter most. Real-time visibility into your operations, sales, and growth metrics.

services.title: Predictive Analytics & Forecasting
services.description: Leverage machine learning and statistical models to anticipate trends, reduce churn, and make forward-looking decisions with confidence.

services.title: Data Strategy & Governance
services.description: Build a robust data infrastructure with clear ownership, quality standards, and a roadmap that scales with your organization.

services.title: Custom Reporting & KPI Design
services.description: Define the metrics that actually move the needle. I design reporting frameworks tailored to your industry, audience, and decision cadence.

services.title: SQL / Python / BI Tool Consulting
services.description: Hands-on consulting with Tableau, Power BI, Looker, BigQuery, Python, and SQL — training your team or building solutions from scratch.

testimonials.quote: Ian transformed months of messy spreadsheets into a Tableau dashboard our entire executive team now uses weekly. The ROI was immediate.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: The predictive churn model Ian built reduced our customer attrition by 23% in Q2. Absolutely world-class data thinking applied to a real business problem.
testimonials.author: David J.

testimonials.quote: Ian doesn't just deliver reports — he asks the questions that make you think about your business differently. A true strategic partner, not just a consultant.
testimonials.author: Amina K.
